source.note: Support teammate: only team buffs are used by the evaluator. Combat hit definitions/multipliers can be added if a Gorou-as-main leaderboard is ever needed. Skill values: Standing Firm flat DEF 371.088 and Crunch Geo DMG 15% at skill Lv10 (Project Amber).

team_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Elemental Skill (General's War Banner) — Standing Firm (1+ Geo party member): nearby active characters gain a flat DEF bonus of 371.088 (skill Lv10).
Elemental Skill (General's War Banner) — Crunch (3 Geo party members): nearby active characters gain +15% Geo DMG Bonus.
A1 Heedless of the Wind and Weather: after using his Elemental Burst, nearby party members gain +25% DEF for 12s.
C6 Valiant Hound: Mountainous Fealty: with Crunch active, nearby party members gain +40% Geo CRIT DMG for 12s after his Skill/Burst.
